tiers.1: Core Foundations - breaks everything if broken
tiers.3: Feature Extensions - important but less frequent

coverageStatus.full: Comprehensive tests covering happy path, edge cases, and visual regression
coverageStatus.partial: Some test coverage but gaps remain
coverageStatus.visual-only: Only screenshot comparison, no functional assertions
coverageStatus.unit-only: Unit tests exist but no E2E or visual coverage

features.name: Grid Rendering & Canvas
features.description: Canvas-based grid rendering, cell painting, gridlines, headers
features.notes: E2E covers empty grid, text rendering, formatting, and cell clearing with visual regression.

features.name: Scrolling & Virtualization
features.description: Viewport scrolling, virtualized rendering, scroll-to-cell
features.notes: E2E covers mouse wheel scroll, distant cell navigation, virtualization at row 5000, and data persistence after scrolling.

features.name: Selection & Cursor
features.description: Cell selection, range selection, multi-select, active cell
features.notes: E2E covers navigation but no visual verification of selection highlight.

features.name: Cell Editing & Input
features.description: Inline editor, formula bar input, commit/cancel, F2 edit mode
features.notes: Good E2E coverage of editing workflows. No visual regression.

features.name: Formula Parsing & Evaluation
features.description: Formula entry, parsing, evaluation, dependency graph, recalculation
features.notes: Strong unit + Rust test coverage. E2E verifies basic formula round-trips.

features.name: Undo/Redo Stack
features.description: Transaction-based undo/redo for all operations
features.notes: E2E covers basic undo/redo. No testing of undo across feature interactions.

features.name: Sheet Management
features.description: Add/delete/rename/reorder sheets, sheet tabs, sheet navigation
features.notes: Basic E2E coverage. No visual verification of sheet tabs.

features.name: File Save/Load (.cala)
features.description: Save workbook to .cala format, open .cala files, roundtrip integrity
features.notes: Rust tests cover serialization. E2E covers save/open. Roundtrip integrity could be more thorough.

features.name: Column Width & Row Height
features.description: Resize columns/rows, auto-fit, default dimensions
features.notes: E2E covers auto-fit, row height, column width via Format menu, and mixed widths with visual regression.

features.name: Copy/Paste/Cut
features.description: Internal clipboard, copy/paste cell values and formulas, cut
features.notes: E2E covers basic copy/paste. No paste-special E2E coverage.

features.name: Merge Cells
features.description: Merge/unmerge cells, merged cell rendering
features.notes: Unit and E2E coverage. No visual regression for merged cell appearance.

features.name: Freeze Panes & Split
features.description: Freeze rows/columns, split window
features.notes: E2E covers basic freeze. No visual verification.

features.name: Cell Formatting
features.description: Bold, italic, underline, font, color, borders, alignment, number formats
features.notes: E2E verifies via Tauri API. No visual verification that formatting renders correctly on canvas.

features.name: AutoFilter & Filtering
features.description: AutoFilter toggle, column filters, filter UI, hidden rows
features.notes: Unit tests for filter store. E2E covers basic sort/filter toggle.

features.name: Sorting
features.description: Single and multi-level sorting, sort dialog
features.notes: Combined with filter in E2E. Sort dialog not tested visually.

features.name: Pivot Tables
features.description: Create/update/delete pivot tables, field settings, grouping, filtering, drill-through
features.notes: Strong unit coverage. E2E covers basic pivot creation. Complex interactions untested.

features.name: Charts
features.description: Create/edit charts, chart types, data point formatting, axis formatting
features.notes: Extensive unit tests for chart rendering. E2E covers creation. No visual regression.

features.name: Structured Tables
features.description: Create/delete/rename tables, totals row, structured references, table styles
features.notes: No dedicated E2E tests. May be partially covered by workflow specs.

features.name: Find & Replace
features.description: Find dialog, replace dialog, find all, match options

features.name: Insert/Delete Rows & Columns
features.description: Insert/delete rows and columns, formula reference adjustment

features.name: Named Ranges
features.description: Name Manager, define/edit/delete names, navigate by name
features.notes: E2E covers basic named range CRUD.

features.name: Paste Special
features.description: Paste values, formulas, formatting, link, transpose
features.notes: No E2E coverage for paste special dialog.

features.name: Fill Handle & Auto-Fill
features.description: Drag fill handle, auto-fill series, fill down/right
features.notes: Good coverage of fill logic and E2E drag.

features.name: Zoom
features.description: Zoom slider, zoom presets, zoom to selection

features.name: Conditional Formatting
features.description: CF rules, data bars, color scales, icon sets, rule manager
features.notes: E2E covers basic CF rule creation.

features.name: Data Validation
features.description: Validation rules, dropdown lists, error alerts, circle invalid
features.notes: E2E covers validation dialog and basic rules.

features.name: Row/Column Grouping
features.description: Group/ungroup, collapse/expand, outline levels

features.name: Comments & Notes
features.description: Add/edit/delete comments, replies, resolve, notes, indicators

features.name: Hyperlinks
features.description: Insert/edit/remove hyperlinks, click-to-follow

features.name: Sheet/Workbook Protection
features.description: Protect/unprotect sheets, cell protection, edit ranges

features.name: Sparklines
features.description: In-cell sparkline charts, sparkline design tab

features.name: Slicers
features.description: Slicer widgets, cross-filter, slicer options

features.name: Print & Page Setup
features.description: Print preview, page setup, page breaks, PDF export

features.name: Format Cells Dialog
features.description: Number, alignment, font, border, fill, protection tabs
features.notes: No E2E coverage for the full dialog.

features.name: Subtotals
features.description: Group-by aggregation with outline levels

features.name: Menu Bar & Context Menus
features.description: File/Edit/Insert/Format/Data/Review/View menus, right-click context menu
features.notes: E2E covers menu navigation. No visual regression.

features.name: Ribbon & Home Tab
features.description: Home ribbon tab, formatting buttons, contextual tabs
features.notes: Ribbon used in formatting E2E but not directly tested. No visual regression.

features.name: Formula Bar & Name Box
features.description: Formula bar display/editing, name box navigation
features.notes: Used as assertion point in many E2E tests but not directly tested for visual correctness.

features.name: Advanced Filter
features.description: Filter by criteria range, copy results

features.name: Flash Fill
features.description: Pattern detection and auto-fill

features.name: Goal Seek
features.description: Goal seek dialog and solver

features.name: Solver
features.description: Linear/non-linear optimization

features.name: Scenario Manager
features.description: Add/edit/delete/show scenarios, scenario summary

features.name: Business Intelligence
features.description: PostgreSQL connections, in-memory model, BI pivots
features.notes: Requires external database. Not suitable for basic nightly tests.

features.name: Distribution (.calp)
features.description: Publish/subscribe, overrides, writeback, audit log

features.name: Scripting & Script Editor
features.description: Script editor, notebook, object scripts, templates
features.notes: E2E tests for scriptable objects and shapes.

features.name: CSV Import/Export
features.description: CSV import and export dialogs

features.name: Consolidate
features.description: Data consolidation across ranges/sheets

features.name: Data Tables (What-If)
features.description: One-variable and two-variable data tables

features.name: Remove Duplicates
features.description: Remove duplicate rows dialog

features.name: Text to Columns
features.description: Text to columns wizard dialog

features.name: Formula Tracing
features.description: Trace precedents/dependents arrows overlay

features.name: Evaluate Formula
features.description: Step-by-step formula evaluator dialog

features.name: Error Checking
features.description: Green triangle error indicators
features.notes: No automated test coverage. Visual-only feature — perfect candidate for screenshot testing.

features.name: Watch Window
features.description: Floating dialog for monitoring cell values

features.name: Format Painter
features.description: Single-click and lock modes for format copying

features.name: Formula Autocomplete
features.description: Function autocomplete dropdown and tooltip
features.notes: Unit tests for completion logic. No visual test for dropdown overlay.

features.name: Status Bar & Aggregations
features.description: Status bar aggregation (SUM, AVG, COUNT), zoom slider
features.notes: No automated test coverage. Easy visual regression candidate.

features.name: Checkbox Controls
features.description: In-cell checkbox rendering and click toggling

features.name: Shape/Form Controls
features.description: Buttons, dropdowns, spinners, properties pane

features.name: Timeline Slicer
features.description: Date-based timeline slicer widget

features.name: Auto-Recover
features.description: Auto-save at configurable intervals

features.name: AI Chat
features.description: AI assistant sidebar with Claude API
features.notes: Requires API key. Not suitable for automated nightly.

features.name: Custom Fill Lists
features.description: Custom fill series lists dialog

features.name: Data Form
features.description: Row-by-row data entry dialog

features.name: Go To Special
features.description: Go To Special dialog (blanks, constants, formulas, etc.)

features.name: Document Theme
features.description: Page Layout tab, theme colors and fonts
features.notes: No automated test coverage. Good visual regression candidate.

features.name: Search Panel
features.description: Search activity bar view with find/replace
features.notes: No E2E coverage. Find/replace dialog is separately tested.

features.name: Settings Panel
features.description: Application settings activity bar view

features.name: File Explorer
features.description: Workbook structure tree view, virtual files

features.name: JSON View
features.description: JSON editor for structured cell values

features.name: Defined Functions (Custom)
features.description: Define Function dialog for user-defined formulas

features.name: Cell Bookmarks
features.description: Add/remove/navigate bookmarks, highlight, bookmark pane

features.name: Scriptable Objects
features.description: User-scriptable objects with TypeScript, templates, marketplace
